revision.content:
If you are the last person to leave this room, please take a minute and check the following:

* Back door is locked * Garage door is locked * All equipment is turned off * Any gas bottles used are closed * If we are low on any gases, please email the members list * All tools returned to their proper places * Workspace or tool(s) you were using are clean * All lights turned off * Additionally, we remind you: workbenches are NOT project storage. Put your project up in an appropriate storage area. We thank you for your effort, together we can make Bloominglabs a better place for everyone to use. [[Image:Qrcode_blabs_exit_protocol.jpg|none|thumb|100px|Link to latest version of this document]] [[Category:Documents]] [[Category:The_Space]] [[Category:Protocols]]
